candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortisation in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: Explicitly labeled as D&A within Cost of goods sold and appears as a component under the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold', so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortisation in Selling expenses
candidates.why: Belongs to selling expenses, not COGS.
Standalone label has no visible amounts and no clear linkage to COGS; not a clear separate COGS D&A row to add.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Administrative expenses
candidates.why: Belongs to administrative expenses, not COGS.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of goods sold'. The visible COGS D&A row is a named sub-component of that selected total, so it should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortisation in Selling expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly a component within the selected parent row 'Selling expenses', so it is already embedded in the XSGA bucket and should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Administrative expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly a component within the selected parent row 'Administrative expenses', so it is already embedded in the XSGA bucket and should not be added separately.
Standalone label has no visible amounts and no clear assignment to SG&A/R&D; not a usable separate operating D&A row to add.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortisation in Cost of goods sold

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket is the sum of Selling expenses, Research and development costs, Administrative expenses, and Other operating expenses. The only explicit SG&A-related D&A rows shown are within selling and administrative expenses, indicating they are sub-components already included in the selected rows. No explicit separate amortization-in-R&D row is present.
